offer: For property managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers

DM outreach to property managers with demo video

Short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
